message:
🐛 Fix OAuth redirect URL in production mode (#46)

Default frontend URL to port 8080 in production mode since the backend
serves the frontend. Only use port 5174 in dev mode where Vite runs.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
